# mirroring()

**Instance Method**

Returns whether video mirroring is enabled during snapshots.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor func mirroring() -> Bool
```

## Return Value

Returns YES if video mirroring is enabled, NO otherwise.

## Getting and Setting Mirroring

- **setMirroring(_:)**: Controls whether the receiver enables video mirroring during snapshots.
